items.briefing:
New research from insurer QBE finds that AI is now linked to half of all cyber incidents affecting Australian organisations — a sharp reminder that the same tools boosting productivity are also being used by attackers. Separately, a critical security flaw in Ivanti software was actively exploited by criminals within just 24 hours of becoming public knowledge; if your organisation uses Ivanti products, ensure your IT team applies any available patches immediately.

While overall phishing volumes have dropped globally, attacks are becoming more targeted and harder to spot. Stay alert to suspicious emails, particularly those creating urgency or requesting login details.

**Tip:** If you receive an unexpected email asking you to click a link or enter your credentials, verify the request by calling the sender directly before acting.

featured.title: AI linked to half of Australian cyber incidents, QBE
featured.quote: AI involvement in over a quarter of Australian cyber incidents reveals emerging threat landscape.
